meaning: adj.不须花钱的,无须付出代价的
examples: None of these solutions is exactly costless.
The Cheap Nike shoes costless fast suit is severely an extraordinary sneaker.
The strategies make use of simple messages that can generate significant returns with changes that are virtually costless.
There was a time, back in the 1950s and 1960s, when Keynesian stimulus packages were seen as costless.
There is a common fallacy, not least in Germany, that dropping the Greeks would be a fairly costless way to teach a useful lesson.
